title: Actinophyllum troyanum
taxonomy: Actinophyllum troyanum is a genus of green algae that belongs to the class Chlorophyceae. It is further classified under the division Chlorophyta and the kingdom Chromista. Within the kingdom Chromista, Actinophyllum troyanum is classified under the phylum Chlorophyta. The phylum Chlorophyta is a group of green algae that are characterized by their green pigmentation and simple cell structure. Actinophyllum troyanum's classification reflects its position among other green algae.
